title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
